title: [FMCS-H] fps X media X crystal x survival Optimized HIGH
description: A high‑visual, performance‑enhanced modpack designed for cinematic gameplay, advanced media creation, and polished fps.
body:
# 🟥 FMCS‑H — High Edition
## fps × media × crystal × crystal × survival

## 📘 Overview
FMCS‑H is the high‑visual, premium edition of the FMCS series — designed for players who want enhanced graphics, smooth animations, polished clarity, and creator‑friendly tools, while still maintaining strong FPS and competitive responsiveness.

This edition keeps the full performance core of FMCS‑M, then layers high‑quality visuals, improved particle systems, upgraded entity models, cinematic tools, and optional shaders — all optimized to avoid heavy GPU load.

> Perfect for mid‑range and high‑end GPUs.  
> Highly configurable for stable FPS on medium systems.

---

## 🎯 Purpose
- Deliver upgraded visuals without destroying FPS  
- Provide a cinematic and polished experience for creators  
- Maintain smooth, stable frame‑time in PvP and survival  
- Offer an improved aesthetic over FMCS‑M  
- Include optional shaders that are light and gameplay‑safe  
- Balance media quality with performance best‑practices

---

## ✨ Features
- Full optimization layer from FMCS‑L and FMCS‑M  
- Enhanced visual clarity (connected textures, clean glass, refined particles)  
- Improved entity appearance and model detail  
- Better player and item animations  
- Pro‑level PvP HUD (CPS, keystrokes, better crosshair, clean nametags)  
- ReplayMod and creator utilities included  
- Optional lightweight shaders (disabled by default)  
- Performance‑friendly defaults to prevent unexpected FPS drops  
- Smooth camera utilities for cinematic shots

---

## 🧪 Expected Performance
- 1.5x FPS  
- 7x optimize
- 7x smooth
- 6x options

---

## 🔗 Other Editions
- [FMCS‑L (Lite Edition)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fmcs-l)  
- [FMCS‑M (High Edition)](https://modrinth.com/project/fmcs-m)
- [FMCS‑S (High Edition)](https://modrinth.com/project/fmcs-s)

> [!NOTE]
> For weak GPUs → [FMCS‑L](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fmcs-l)  
> 
> For mid GPUs → [FMCS‑M](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fmcs-m) 
> 
> For nicer visuals → [FMCS‑H](https://modrinth.com/project/fmcs-h)
> 
> For servers → [FMCS‑S](https://modrinth.com/project/fmcs-s)
